languages.text: {n}Манипулус без спешки сканирует ауспексом каждый изгиб корпуса машины.{/n} "Эргономика... далека от священных канонов СШК. Очевидно, перед нами образец технологий ксеносов. Да, Нунциус, я конкретизирую — ксеносы принадлежат к виду друкари. Если моя гипотеза верна, богохульное устройство управляется с помощью ноцицептивных систем живого донора. Иными словами, машина питается чужой агонией".

{n}The Manipulus uses his auspex to scan every contour of the machine's casing with unhurried attention.{/n} "The ergonomics... are far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuncius, let me be more specific: the xenos in question is the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine is powered by the pain of another."
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус без спешки сканирует ауспексом каждый изгиб корпуса машины.{/n} "Эргономика... далека от священных канонов СШК. Очевидно, перед нами образец технологий ксеносов. Да, Нунциус, я конкретизирую — ксеносы принадлежат к виду друкари. Если моя гипотеза верна, богохульное устройство управляется с помощью ноцицептивных систем живого донора. Иными словами, машина питается чужой агонией".

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipulus scans every contour of the machine's hull with unhurried precision using his auspex.{/n} "Ergonomics... far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuntius, I shall specify: the xenos in question belong to the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine feeds upon the agony of another."

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus scannt mit seinem Auspex alle Konturen des Maschinengehäuses mit unaufgeregter Aufmerksamkeit.{/n} "Die Ergonomie ... ist von den heiligen Kanonen des STK weit entfernt. Es ist offensichtlich, dass wir uns in Gegenwart von Xenos-Technologie befinden. Ja, Nuncius, ich sollte spezifischer sein: der fragliche Xenos gehört der Spezies der Drukhari an. Sollte meine Hypothese korrekt sein, basiert dieses blasphemische Gerät auf den nozizeptiven Systemen eines lebenden Spenders. Mit anderen Worten wird die Maschine durch Schmerz betrieben."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus uses his auspex to scan every contour of the machine's casing with unhurried attention.{/n} "The ergonomics... are far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuncius, let me be more specific: the xenos in question is the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine is powered by the pain of another."

Sollte meine Hypothese korrekt sein, basiert dieses blasphemische Gerät auf den nozizeptiven Systemen eines lebenden Spenders. Mit anderen Worten wird die Maschine durch Schmerz betrieben."

languages.text: {n}操纵者不紧不慢地用他的俄歇矩阵扫描机器外壳的每一处细节。{/n}“这人体工程学设计……完全背离了STC的神圣准则。毫无疑问，我们面对的是异形技术。对，努恩修斯，让我说得更具体些：这里所说的异形，就是指黑暗灵族。如果我的推测准确，这个不敬的装置是由活人供体的痛觉系统控制的。换句话说，这个机器靠他人的痛苦来驱动。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus uses his auspex to scan every contour of the machine's casing with unhurried attention.{/n} "The ergonomics... are far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuncius, let me be more specific: the xenos in question is the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine is powered by the pain of another."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者不紧不慢地用他的俄歇矩阵扫描机器外壳的每一处细节。{/n}“这人体工程学设计……完全背离了STC的神圣准则。毫无疑问，我们面对的是异形技术。对，努恩修斯，让我说得更具体些：这里所说的异形，就是指黑暗灵族。如果我的推测准确，这个不敬的装置是由活人供体的痛觉系统控制的。换句话说，这个机器靠他人的痛苦来驱动。”

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus se sert de son auspex pour scanner attentivement le boîtier de la machine sous tous les angles.{/n} « L'ergonomie... ne suit pas les préceptes sacrés du SCS. Nous sommes visiblement en présence de technologie xénos. Oui, Nuncius, je peux être plus précis : les xénos en question sont des Drukharis. Si mon hypothèse est juste, cet appareil blasphématoire est contrôlé par le système nociceptif d'un sujet vivant. Autrement dit, cet engin est alimenté par la douleur d'un tiers. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus uses his auspex to scan every contour of the machine's casing with unhurried attention.{/n} "The ergonomics... are far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuncius, let me be more specific: the xenos in question is the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine is powered by the pain of another."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus se sert de son auspex pour scanner attentivement le boîtier de la machine sous tous les angles.{/n} « L'ergonomie... ne suit pas les préceptes sacrés du SCS. Nous sommes visiblement en présence de technologie xénos. Oui, Nuncius, je peux être plus précis : les xénos en question sont des Drukharis. Si mon hypothèse est juste, cet appareil blasphématoire est contrôlé par le système nociceptif d'un sujet vivant. Autrement dit, cet engin est alimenté par la douleur d'un tiers. »

languages.text: {n}El manipulus utiliza su aúspex para escanear hasta el último contorno de la carcasa de la máquina con un interés parsimonioso.{/n} «Las funciones ergonómicas... distan mucho de las establecidas por los sagrados cánones de las PCE. Salta a la vista que nos hallamos en presencia de tecnología xenos. Sí, Nuncius, seré más específico: los xenos en cuestión son la especie conocida como drukhari. Si se confirma mi hipótesis, este dispositivo blasfemo está controlado por los sistemas nociceptivos de un sujeto vivo. En otras palabras, la máquina funciona alimentada por el dolor ajeno».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus uses his auspex to scan every contour of the machine's casing with unhurried attention.{/n} "The ergonomics... are far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuncius, let me be more specific: the xenos in question is the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine is powered by the pain of another."

traits.locale_text: {n}El manipulus utiliza su aúspex para escanear hasta el último contorno de la carcasa de la máquina con un interés parsimonioso.{/n} «Las funciones ergonómicas... distan mucho de las establecidas por los sagrados cánones de las PCE. Salta a la vista que nos hallamos en presencia de tecnología xenos. Sí, Nuncius, seré más específico: los xenos en cuestión son la especie conocida como drukhari. Si se confirma mi hipótesis, este dispositivo blasfemo está controlado por los sistemas nociceptivos de un sujeto vivo. En otras palabras, la máquina funciona alimentada por el dolor ajeno».

languages.text: {n}Manipülus, uzgörenini kullanarak makinenin kasasının her kıvrımını acelesiz bir dikkatle tarıyor.{/n} "Ergonomisi... STC'nin kutsal kurallarından çok uzak. Zeno teknolojisi olduğu aşikâr. Evet Nuncius, daha spesifik olacağım: Söz konusu zeno, Drukhari türüdür. Hipotezim doğruysa bu kâfirce cihaz, canlı bir vericinin nosiseptif sistemlerince yönetiliyor. Başka bir deyişle... Makine, gücünü bir başkasının acısından alıyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus uses his auspex to scan every contour of the machine's casing with unhurried attention.{/n} "The ergonomics... are far removed from the sacred canons of the STC. It is evident we are in the presence of xenos technology. Yes, Nuncius, let me be more specific: the xenos in question is the Drukhari species. If my hypothesis holds true, this blasphemous device is governed by the nociceptive systems of a living donor. In other words, the machine is powered by the pain of another."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus, uzgörenini kullanarak makinenin kasasının her kıvrımını acelesiz bir dikkatle tarıyor.{/n} "Ergonomisi... STC'nin kutsal kurallarından çok uzak. Zeno teknolojisi olduğu aşikâr. Evet Nuncius, daha spesifik olacağım: Söz konusu zeno, Drukhari türüdür. Hipotezim doğruysa bu kâfirce cihaz, canlı bir vericinin nosiseptif sistemlerince yönetiliyor. Başka bir deyişle... Makine, gücünü bir başkasının acısından alıyor."

languages.text: {n}マニピュルスはオースペクスを用い、急ぐ風もなく注意深く機械の筐体の輪郭を残らず走査した。{/n}「人間工学的設計が……STCの神聖な規範からかけ離れています。我々が異種族技術の前にいることは明白です。ええ、ヌンキウス、より具体的に申しましょう――問題の異種族はドルカリ種です。私の仮説が正しければ、この冒涜的な装置は生きた提供者の侵害受容系によって制御されています。言い換えれば、この機械は他者の苦痛を動力源としているのです」
